# The Living Indexes

> A hub for self-updating indexes of the AI-builder ecosystem. Each index is
> recomputed daily from live GitHub signals.

Updated: 2026-06-10T14:01:53.202443+00:00  ·  4897 entries across 15 indexes

- [The Skill Index](https://skill.kymatalabs.com) — 273 entries — Claude Code & AI-agent skills — skills, subagents, slash-commands, hooks.
- [The Eval Index](https://eval.kymatalabs.com) — 268 entries — LLM & agent evaluation, benchmark, observability and red-teaming tools.
- [The Local LLM Index](https://localllm.kymatalabs.com) — 243 entries — Run LLMs on your own hardware — inference engines, runners, quantization.
- [The Prompt Index](https://prompt.kymatalabs.com) — 132 entries — Prompt-engineering resources — collections, system prompts, optimizers, guides.
- [The RAG Index](https://rag.kymatalabs.com) — 214 entries — Retrieval-augmented-generation — RAG frameworks, vector DBs, embeddings, reranking.
- [The Diffusion Index](https://diffusion.kymatalabs.com) — 268 entries — AI image & video generation — diffusion models, ComfyUI nodes, video gen, editing, training.
- [The Voice AI Index](https://voice.kymatalabs.com) — 298 entries — Voice & speech AI — text-to-speech, speech recognition, voice cloning, realtime voice agents.
- [The Dataset Index](https://dataset.kymatalabs.com) — 249 entries — Data-centric AI tooling — labeling & annotation, synthetic data, curation, augmentation, dataset frameworks.
- [The Fine-Tuning Index](https://finetune.kymatalabs.com) — 174 entries — Make your own model — fine-tuning frameworks, PEFT/LoRA, RLHF/DPO, training data.
- [The Gateway Index](https://gateway.kymatalabs.com) — 140 entries — LLM gateways, proxies & routers — the routing layer between apps and model providers.
- [The Agent Index](https://agents.kymatalabs.com) — 279 entries — AI agent frameworks — multi-agent, autonomous agents, orchestration, memory & agent SDKs.
- [StackTracker](https://stacktracker.kymatalabs.com) — None entries — The live momentum index for AI-infrastructure repos.
- [Model Radar](https://modelradar.kymatalabs.com) — 150 entries — What's surging on Hugging Face right now — models ranked by momentum.
- [The MCP Index](https://mcp.kymatalabs.com) — 2195 entries — Every Model Context Protocol server, in one living index.
- [Agent Velocity](https://agentvelocity.kymatalabs.com) — 14 entries — The open-source coding-agent race, ranked by velocity.
